question: Count the number of words in a sentence entered by the user. Assume words are separated by single spaces and there are no leading or trailing spaces.
driver: int main() { std::string sentence; std::getline(std::cin, sentence); if (sentence.empty()) { std::cout << "Number of words: 0\n"; return 0; } std::stringstream ss(sentence); std::string word; int wordCount = 0; while (ss >> word) { wordCount++; } std::cout << "Number of words: " << wordCount << "\n"; return 0; }
